docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PAY THE FILING FEE FOR HIS CLAIM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING
REMARK: NOTICE OF FEE WAIVER HEARING GIVEN IN PERSON TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 THE COURT DENIES YOUR FEE WAIVER REQUEST BECAUSE [X] THE INFORMATION YOU PROVIDED ON THE REQUEST SHOWS THAT YOU ARE NOT ELIGIBLE FOR THE FEE WAIVER YOU REQUESTED, EVERYBOX REGARDING SERVICE OF INCOME IS MARKED. ADDITIONALLY , YOU STATE YOU HAVE AN INFINITE AMOUNT OF INCOME. AS TO PLAINTIFF BUSTO, C M
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JULY 21, 2021 AT 1:30PM IN DEPARTMENT 506, 400 MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102.
ORDER RE: HEARING ON FEE WAIVER - DENIED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.00 FILED BY BUSTO, C M AS TO DEFENDANT GOOGLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FEE WAIVER HEARING - HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

FEE WAIVER HEARING - FILED BY ON MAR-25-2021 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF C M BUSTO IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF'S FEE WAIVER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS UNTIL JULY 12, 2021 TO SUBMIT A NEW FEE WAIVER APPLICATION OR PAY THE FILING FEE FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. FILING FEE IS $50.00. IF FILING FEES ARE NOT PAID OR A NEW APPLICATION IS NOT SUBMITTED BY THIS DATE, PLAINTIFF'S SMALL CLAIM MATTER WILL NOT MOVE FORWARD WITH A HEARING AND THE CLAIM WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSTO, C M

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF C M BUSTOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOOGLE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PAY THE FILING FEE ON HIS CLAIM. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
